llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 8.3 (Approval of the Addendum to the Measure U Application for Taft Community School) was pulled from the consent agenda by Trustee Marquez

items.intro_words: Evelyn, I think we can start with the roll call. Trustee Lee.
Evelyn, I think we can start with the roll call. Trustee Lee.
Good evening, and welcome to the December 10, 2025, meeting of the Redwood City School Board.
All right, we are on to changes to the agenda. Does anyone have any changes they would like to propose?
All right, can I get a motion to approve the agenda as amended?
All right, we are on to the public comment section. I see none submitted online, none on Zoom, and we have no speakers cards.
So we will move on to our next item, which is going to be our first of two school and community reports. This is 6.1. It's the presentation on Redwood City TK program.
Let's move on to our next community school report. This is the review of the California Dashboard Report.
That ends our discussion items. We can move on to approval of the consent.
So let's start with 7.1. This is the first reading and discussion of the board Policy and Architecture 0510.
So, okay, 7.2. We can move on. This is the first reading discussion for board policy 1100.
Shall we move on to 7.3? Okay, so this is the first reading and discussion of BP and AR 1340.
Shall we move on to 7.4? All right. 7.4 is board policy. 1111 2. Media relations.
I say we do seven five and seven six. We can discuss them together. They're both.
I say we do seven five and seven six. We can discuss them together. They're both.
Let's move on to 7.7. This is the first reading discussion of the BP and AR 5113.12.
Move on to 7.8. Okay. 7.8 is the first reading discussion of BP and AR5125.
These are considered routine. We'll pass them in one motion. We did remove 8.3 to a later date.

We're on to our action items. And this is the 9.1. This is the adoption of the annual organizational meeting date.
Now we're going to move on to discussing and selecting a taxpayer organization representative for the Citizens Bond Oversight Committee.
Miranta board and superintendent reports. I asked Evelyn to extend the time this one because I know we've just attended the annual educators conference.
Let's move on. We have no information items, so then we're on to Section 12 correspondence.
Let's review our governance calendar. We have a schedule of future agenda items and a parking lot of suggested topics that could go onto that governance calendar.
Onto board trustee meeting reflection. Thoughts on how to improve the meeting.
Note on Saturday. We have a long closed session. I'm sure everyone's aware of that.
All right, so then we are on to adjournment. Can I get a motion to adjourn?
